rows.label: tev078501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Konichian about the Overeds in Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Konichian about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Konichian about the Overeds in Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0001
rows.name:
The one they call Yelena, the
Sequestered, has been sighted on
the East Janpath Plain. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0002
rows.name:
I hear she's not easy to find, but if
you search the areas where scirpos
flock, you might get lucky. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Incidentally, I've heard that
scirpo abdomens hold some truly
high-quality voltant. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0004
rows.name:
I couldn't tell you if that's actually true or
not. *fsssh* But if you ever manage to crack
one open, come back and tell me how it went![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'd like to collect all the Miralife Cards
depicting venomous indigens. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0009
rows.name:
But I don't have any money left to
pay for cards! I wonder how I can
make some around here? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0010
rows.name:
...What? *fsssh* You say I could join
BLADE and accept jobs from Quest Board?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0011
rows.name:
I certainly share BLADE's interest in indigens, but...
Well, if I were to leave this city, I doubt I could
survive even a single hit from such a monster. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0012
rows.name:
There has to be a safer way to make
money that still involves dealing
with venomous beasts. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0020
rows.name:
I've heard of a species of indigen
known as adsecula that favors the
damp of the Silent Mire. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0021
rows.name:
Apparently one of them is a real
tough customer that's already fought
off a number of BLADEs. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0022
rows.name:
Heh heh. *fsssh* As a bit of a
basement dweller myself, I can't
help but take a little pride in that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0023
rows.name:
Um...b-but of course I take
no pleasure in the defeat of
our noble BLADEs. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Konichian about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0013
rows.name:
I spend most of my day staring at
those cards you gave me. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0014
rows.name:
I want more of them! But I
don't have any money, so there's
not much I can do. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078501_MSG0015
rows.name:
I guess I'll have to gather up
more unusual bones and grasses
to trade to collectors. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]
